title: Phase 23 — First Content Click Attack (3 Pages Only)
rule: 3 real pages max. Position <=20 preferred. Impressions >0. No click. Not edited in last 48h unless emergency. No thin tools/scenarios.

pages.query: if you borrow $20,000 for 5 years at an annual rate of 8%, what would the monthly payment be
pages.why_not_clicking: Above-fold CTA was pointing to a thin tool page (tools/loan-20k-5yr-8pct). User saw a thin preset calculator instead of the real loan calculator.
pages.fix_applied: Phase 22: Replaced thin tool CTA with real loan calculator. Added result-first heading: 'Monthly Payment: $405.53'. Added prominent callout box. Fixed FAQ links.
pages.expected_effect: CTR improvement from 0% to >0% within 7 days of Google re-crawling
pages.next_action_if_fail: Improve meta description to better match query intent. Add FAQ schema.

pages.why_not_clicking: Position 8 is good but 1 impression means very low query volume for this page. May be competing with thin compound tool variants that have higher impressions.
pages.fix_applied: Phase 22: Cross-links from investment-return, retirement-planning, guides. Parent strengthening via internal links.
pages.expected_effect: Minor — 1 impression makes this a low-volume test. Parent authority transfer may help long-term.
pages.next_action_if_fail: Accept this page has low search volume. Focus on higher-volume parents.

pages.query: should i pay off debt or invest calculator
pages.why_not_clicking: Position dropped from 16.3 to 52 — page lost visibility. At pos 16.3 with 64 impressions it had click potential. Now at pos 52 it's invisible.
pages.fix_applied: Phase 22.1: Internal links from loan-calculator, investment-return, compound-interest.
pages.cooldown: UNTIL_JUN_26 (only links added, no content change)
pages.expected_effect: Position recovery from 52 toward 16.3 range. Internal links may help but authority gap is the real issue.
pages.next_action_if_fail: Decision pages need backlinks. Include pay-off-debt-or-invest in outreach pitch as linkable asset.

honest_assessment: Only 1 of 3 pages (blog/20000-loan) has both high impressions AND reasonable position. The other 2 are deep-position pages where the fix is authority (backlinks), not content. The 3-page limit forces focus: other pages should NOT be tweaked unless they become position 1-20 with impressions.
